text: Here, inside this contemporary space filled with the language of research and innovation, I am struck by the sense that knowledge is always in motion—never settled. The display speaks to how easily perception can blur, and I feel a strange kinship with the uncertainty voiced in the exhibit text. There is comfort in knowing that questioning and curiosity are valued here; yet, I also feel exposed, aware of how fragile clarity can be. I find myself both inspired and unsettled, suspended between understanding and ambiguity.
